title: dryopteris affinis var. distans
intro: Dryopteris affinis var. distans, also known as golden spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of golden spleenwort include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
